work_done: Created automation/telegram/sender.py: Telegram API sender with HTTP POST, error handling, retry awareness, and credential redaction

Created automation/control/status_scheduler.py: Reads current_round.yaml structured fields, builds state dict, generates summary via StatusReporter, sends via TelegramSender, implements /pause and /start check semantics
Created automation/control/test_telegram_status.py: 13 anti-regression tests covering stale state detection, structured field reading, pause safety, start rejection conditions
Updated automation/runtime/api_automode_loop.py: Added _report_status() method that actually calls StatusReporter.generate_summary() and format_for_telegram()
Verified StatusReporter reads only structured fields and does not access notes or free-text
Verified /pause semantics: safe stop after current round, before next dispatch, never interrupts atomic steps
Verified /start semantics: rejects when chain frozen, backlog pending, paused, or state inconsistent; only accepts when all gates clear
